title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/compression_engine.py (第 253 至 520 行，共 1554 行) ---
 253 |     def _select_strategy(self, messages: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> CompressionStrategy:
 254 |         """
 255 |         根据消息特征自动选择压缩策略
 256 | 
 257 |         决策规则：
 258 |         1. 错误密集（错误占比 > 30%）→ LLM_SUMMARY
 259 |         2. 工具密集（工具调用占比 > 40%）→ KEYFRAME
 260 |         3. 其他情况 → SLIDING_WINDOW（最可靠）
 261 | 
 262 |         Args:
 263 |             messages: 消息列表
 264 | 
 265 |         Returns:
 266 |             CompressionStrategy: 选择的策略
 267 |         """
 268 |         if not messages:
 269 |             return CompressionStrategy.SLIDING_WINDOW
 270 | 
 271 |         # 统计消息特征
 272 |         error_count = 0
 273 |         tool_count = 0
 274 | 
 275 |         for msg in messages:
 276 |             # 统计错误消息
 277 |             content = str(msg.get("content", ""))
 278 |             if any(keyword in content for keyword in ["Error", "错误", "Exception", "失败", "Traceback"]):
 279 |                 error_count += 1
 280 | 
 281 |             # 统计工具调用
 282 |             if msg.get("role") == "tool":
 283 |                 tool_count += 1
 284 | 
 285 |         # 计算占比
 286 |         total = len(messages)
 287 |         error_ratio = error_count / total
 288 |         tool_ratio = tool_count / total
 289 | 
 290 |         print(f"   [策略选择] 错误占比: {error_ratio:.2%}, 工具占比: {tool_ratio:.2%}")
 291 | 
 292 |         # 决策逻辑
 293 |         if error_ratio > self.error_dense_threshold:
 294 |             print(f"   [策略选择] 错误密集 → LLM_SUMMARY")
 295 |             return CompressionStrategy.LLM_SUMMARY
 296 | 
 297 |         if tool_ratio > self.tool_dense_threshold:
 298 |             print(f"   [策略选择] 工具密集 → KEYFRAME")
 299 |             return CompressionStrategy.KEYFRAME
 300 | 
 301 |         print(f"   [策略选择] 一般对话 → SLIDING_WINDOW")
 302 |         return CompressionStrategy.SLIDING_WINDOW
 303 | 
 304 |     # ========== 策略 1: LLM 摘要 ==========
 305 | 
 306 |     async def _compress_with_llm(
 307 |         self,
 308 |         messages: List[Dict[str, Any]],
 309 |         llm_summarizer_func: Optional[Callable],
 310 |         existing_summary: str,
 311 |         min_keep: int
 312 |     ) -> CompressionResult:
 313 |         """
 314 |         使用 LLM 生成摘要（当前策略）
 315 | 
 316 |         🔥 Phase 2 优化：
 317 |         - 添加缓存机制（避免重复调用）
 318 |         - 添加频率限制（每小时最多 10 次）
 319 |         - 超限时降级到 SLIDING_WINDOW
 320 | 
 321 |         Args:
 322 |             messages: 消息列表
 323 |             llm_summarizer_func: LLM 摘要函数
 324 |             existing_summary: 已有的摘要
 325 |             min_keep: 最少保留的消息数量
 326 | 
 327 |         Returns:
 328 |             CompressionResult
 329 |         """
 330 |         if not llm_summarizer_func:
 331 |             print("   [警告] LLM_SUMMARY 策略需要 llm_summarizer_func，降级到 SLIDING_WINDOW")
 332 |             return self._compress_with_sliding_window(messages, 0.3, min_keep)
 333 | 
 334 |         # 划分消息：最近完整 turn 原样保留，较旧完整 turn 作为摘要候选。
 335 |         keep_messages = self._select_recent_complete_turn_messages(messages, min_keep)
 336 |         keep_start = len(messages)
 337 |         if keep_messages:
 338 |             keep_start = min(
 339 |                 messages.index(msg)
 340 |                 for msg in keep_messages
 341 |                 if msg in messages
 342 |             )
 343 |         to_summarize = self._select_summary_candidate_messages(messages[:keep_start])
 344 |         builder = TurnBuilder()
 345 |         safe_turns = builder.complete_turns_only(builder.build(messages))
 346 |         summarized_turns = builder.complete_turns_only(builder.build(to_summarize))
 347 |         keep_turn_ids = {turn.id for turn in builder.complete_turns_only(builder.build(keep_messages))}
 348 |         dropped_turns = [turn for turn in safe_turns if turn.id not in keep_turn_ids and all(turn.id != st.id for st in summarized_turns)]
 349 |         compressed_state = self._extract_compressed_state(safe_turns, dropped_turns)
 350 | 
 35...

 319 |         - 超限时降级到 SLIDING_WINDOW
 320 | 
 321 |         Args:
 322 |             messages: 消息列表
 323 |             llm_summarizer_func: LLM 摘要函数
 324 |             existing_summary: 已有的摘要

 326 |
